weekly.summary: The intern established the project repository and configured the necessary environment variables, successfully identifying and integrating free API resources across various technology stacks. They then addressed issues with existing automation schedules by transitioning from GitHub Actions to low-traffic cron jobs. This strategic pivot effectively resolved the queue enlistment waiting problem for routine operational tasks, ensuring more reliable and timely execution of scheduled processes.

weekly.summary: The intern investigated the impact of data topology on deep neural network performance by testing a model with circular classification data. Further exploration into language model architectures and training methodologies was undertaken, leading to the application of a deep neural network to both spiral and circular datasets to analyze its behavior across different geometric data distributions.
